positive: A stylish, minimalist watercolor-style illustration of a cosmic otter floating among stylized nebulae and crescent moons. The composition is perfectly centered, showcasing the otter in a graceful silhouette amidst deep indigo and vibrant cyan gradients. The style should blend delicate watercolor wash textures with strong, clean linework, reminiscent of mid-century celestial art. The overall mood is whimsical and serene. Emphasis on high contrast between the dark, star-dust background and the bright, softly glowing otter figure. Print-friendly composition suitable for repeat pattern or large central graphic.
